title: Vader's Golden Programmer Art Wheat Pack
description: (1.0 вЂ” 1.21.1+) Replaces wheat to be more golden-colored in Vanilla for Programmer Art. 'V1.0.0'
body:
**[https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24](https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24)**

**[https://linktr.ee/vaderman24](https://linktr.ee/vaderman24)**

![Thumbnail](https://lh7-us.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcaSCsWQwnV7HcU6w2NZQecD3aQH780aUHwoKVSDMFfGOB142qu1aLRf0AUdqnbAsG6MLI8XTfh5U_8P5vC22rauOkHCaMjwwrO4UzUyl-clJtxONJK4fVUqlgeAzELJU6ZylvVJLLoZlQrmgZqXzv0KURJ?key=TbQixWWh_bnxOhj6JlQVUA)

([CURSEFORGE PAGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vaders-golden-programmer-wheat-pack))

([MASTER INFORMATION DOCUMENT](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11TsQcNQzgVT0TFNEEOw6AE3HdvilJUr5GjA7YDEvQ5w/edit?usp=sharing))

([PLANET MINECRAFT PAGE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vader-s-golden-programmer-wheat-pack-wheat-replacement/))

![About](https://lh7-us.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeWpYTR8aeRHbUXOXjVqlXPnXe77xEn-Mf1E159NndL5k7RuLjlFsWOIUf52gS_1jiWM9g7g2cXyE-ikzNZF8CSCI7yeJePIIPMyhFVGKiJBI7J5XNK_FCtagNAwS3fmXjHUcLG_4fu4gQApKy3CidpB6sn?key=TbQixWWh_bnxOhj6JlQVUA)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This pack fixes the tops & sides of hay blocks to have no more green-tints, replaces wheat & wheat_stage7 with a texture that is closer to the color of hay blocks, and adds a new model for all crops that adds a 3rd texture pane down the center.

I hope to maintain this pack at my own pace and vision. So please be patient with any and all updates.

This project supports Minecraft versions 1.0 - 1.21 all in one file. If it does not work or something seems broken on any particular version, please let me know via the comments section, DM, or email me at @vaders.contact@yahoo.com and I'll try to fix it as soon as possible.

</details>
